build_lessons:
Bishop hit two bugs from outer-template-literal interaction: (a) raw backticks in inner JS (regex literals + comments) terminate the outer TS template literal — fixed by switching to String.fromCharCode(96) + new RegExp(BT+...) construction; (b) 
 in regex literals gets transformed to literal newline by template-literal escape pass — fixed by escaping as \n. Lessons captured for future PWA iterations: prefer programmatic regex construction (new RegExp) inside template literals; never use bare 
 in regex literals.
